m	Z	m
e	e	f
A module with platform-specific extended precision `numpy.number` subclasses.
The subclasses are defined here (instead of ``__init__.pyi``) such
that they can be imported conditionally via the numpy's mypy plugin.
TYPE_CHECKING
AnyN
_80Bit
_96Bit
_128Bit
_256Bit)
__doc__
typingr
numpyZ
unsignedintegerZ
uint128Z
uint256Z
signedintegerZ
int128Z
int256Z
floatingZ
float80Z
float96Z
float128Z
float256Z
complexfloatingZ
complex160Z
complex192Z
complex256Z
complex512
F/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/numpy/typing/_extended_precision.py
<module>
